g.title: SelfImage
g.text: Chiralogy self-image (proof-level). Regenerated by `lake exe depgraph-proof`, do not edit.

Two levels: colour = character (blue apophatic, the larger hand; orange cataphatic; grey scaffolding; purple seam); dashed sub-boxes = the measured sub-machineries (module) within each hand. Base = the two absences and the diagonal taproot; the empty center peripheral.
Edges: faint = internal wiring; grey = cross-region joint; red dashed = proof-only (implicit, draining to the absences).
